perms.usage_description:
`+perms set <lvl> <target>` : Add a permission.
`+perms del <lvl> <target>` : Remove a permission.
`+perms list` : View configuration.
`+perms reset` : Reset all.

set.help_description:
Here are the available commands to configure the bot:

`+set perm <cmd> <target>`
> Manage command permissions.

`+set muterole <role>`
> Manually set the Mute role.

`+set vocal <on/off> [channel]`
> Make the bot join a voice channel (24/7).

`+set name <nickname>`
> Change the bot's nickname on the server.

`+set pic <url>`
> Change the bot's avatar (via link).

`+set banner <url>`
> Change the bot's banner (via link).

`+set profile`
> Open the profile modification menu.

`+set lang <fr/en>`
> Change the bot's language.

`+set boostembed <#channel>`
> Set the boost logs channel.

`+set levels <on/off>`
> Enable or disable the levels system.
set.target_not_found: ❌ Target user or role not found.
set.description: Config (e.g. `+set levels on` to enable levels)

lang.custom_usage: ❌ Usage: `+lang custom <on/off>` (Attach a JSON file to set)

help_embed.title: Language Management
help_embed.description:
This command allows you to manage the bot's language on the server.

**Commands:**

`+lang get`
> Displays the current language and the custom language file URL (if active).

`+lang custom <on/off>`
> Enables or disables custom language.
> **To set a language:** Attach a valid `.json` file to your message while typing `+lang custom on`.

theme.help_description: Customize the main color of bot embeds for this server.
theme.color_desc:

The color will apply to most bot messages.

help.title: **YAKO GUARDIAN - HELP**
help.welcome: Welcome to the interactive help panel.

category.administration:
__**⚖️ Administration**__

`{{prefix}}backup <create/load/list/delete> [name]` - *Backup System*
`{{prefix}}unbanall` - *Unban all users*
`{{prefix}}autobackup <on/off>` - *Auto Backups*
`{{prefix}}renew` - *Renewal*
`{{prefix}}sync` - *Synchronization*
`{{prefix}}discussion` - *Interactive session*

You must be an Administrator to manage backups.
backup.menu_description:
Manage full server backups (Roles, Channels, Permissions).

🔹 **Create Backup**
`+backup create <name>`
> *Saves current configuration.*

🔹 **Load Backup**
`+backup load <name>`
> *Restores an old configuration (⚠️ Destructive).*

🔹 **Delete Backup**
`+backup delete <name>`
> *Permanently deletes a backup.*

🔹 **List Backups**
`+backup list`
> *Shows all available backups.*
backup.usage:
**💾 BACKUP SYSTEM**

`+backup create <name>` : Create a backup.
`+backup load <name>` : Load a backup (Danger!).
`+backup delete <name>` : Delete a backup.
`+backup list` : See your backups.

help_embed.title: Permission Management
help_embed.description:
This command allows you to modify who can use a specific command on **this server**.

**Syntax:**
`+change <command> <permission>`

**Special Values:**
• `0`: **Everyone** (No permission required)
• `-1`: **Disabled** (No one can use it)

**Examples:**
• `+change ping Administrator` (Only admins can use +ping)
• `+change help 0` (Everyone can use +help)
• `+change invite -1` (Command disabled)

**Note:** Use exact Discord permission names in English (e.g., `ManageMessages`, `BanMembers`, `KickMembers`).

restrict.usage:
**Usage:** `+restrict <OptionName/Emoji> <@AllowedRole>`

Example:
`+restrict Games @Member` (Only @Member can take the 'Games' option)
`+restrict 🛡️ @Staff`

Use `+join <#channel> <message>` to set channel and message.
Or type `+join menu` to use the interactive menu.

boostembed.embed_desc:
Thanks to {{user}} for boosting the server!
We now have **{{count}}** boosts!
boostembed.description: Configure boost announcements (channel, message, embed, image...).
boostembed.help_details:
**🚀 Boost Configuration**

`+boostembed <on/off>`: Enable/Disable module.
`+boostembed channel <#channel>`: Set announcement channel.
`+boostembed message <text/reset>`: Message outside embed (e.g. "Thx {{user}}!").
`+boostembed title <text/reset>`: Embed title.
`+boostembed description <text/reset>`: Embed description.
`+boostembed image <url/reset>`: Embed image (GIF/PNG).
`+boostembed thumbnail <url/reset>`: Thumbnail (default: booster avatar).
`+boostembed test`: Send test message.

**Variables:** `{{user}}` (mention), `{{count}}` (boost count).
boostembed.invalid_url: ❌ Invalid URL. Make sure it starts with `http`.
boostembed.channel_invalid: ❌ Invalid channel. Please mention a text channel.

captcha.menu_description:
The Captcha system verifies new members to prevent automated bots.

__**Current Status:**__ {status}
__**Difficulty:**__ {difficulty}
__**Channel:**__ {channel}

__**Configuration:**__
`+captcha on` • Enable protection
`+captcha off` • Disable protection
`+captcha difficulty <easy/medium/hard>` • Set difficulty
`+captcha role <@role>` • Set role given after verification
`+captcha channel <#channel>` • Set verification channel
`+captcha isolation` • Configure strict isolation (hides channels)
`+captcha bypass <add/del> <@role>` • Manage exempted roles
captcha.isolation_processing: 🔄 Isolation setup in progress... Creating role and updating permissions...
captcha.isolation_info_desc: New members will be isolated until they pass the Captcha.
captcha.isolation_status_desc:
Current Status: **{{status}}**

To enable: `{{prefix}}captcha isolation on`
To disable: `{{prefix}}captcha isolation off`

antibot.menu_description:
The Anti-Bot system protects your server against malicious or unverified bots.

__**Current Status:**__ {status}

__**Configuration:**__
`+antibot on` • Enable protection
`+antibot off` • Disable protection

antiflood.menu_description:
Anti-Flood prevents massive account joins in a short period.

__**Current Status:**__ {status}

__**Configuration:**__
`+antiflood join on` • Enable protection
`+antiflood join off` • Disable protection

antitoken.menu_description:
Protects the server against token raids (fake accounts).

__**Current Status:**__ {status}
__**Limit:**__ {limit}

__**Configuration:**__
`+antitoken on` • Enable
`+antitoken off` • Disable
`+antitoken lock` • Lock server
`+antitoken <number>/<time>` • Configure limit (e.g. 5/10s)

rank.disabled: ❌ Level system is disabled. Use `+set levels on` to enable it.

rep.self: ❌ You cannot give reputation to yourself.

automation.help_description: Configure automation modules for your server.
automation.help_autonick:
Automatically change the nickname of new members.
`+automation autonick set [format]`
`+automation autonick disable`
automation.help_autothread:
Automatically create a thread in specified channels.
`+automation autothread add #channel`
`+automation autothread remove #channel`
`+automation autothread list`
automation.help_autoslowmode:
Automatically enable slowmode in case of spam.
`+automation autoslowmode set <limit> <time> <duration>`
`+automation autoslowmode disable`
automation.autoslowmode_usage:
**Usage:** `+automation autoslowmode <set/disable> [limit] [time]`
Limit: message count, Time: interval in seconds.
